stemHtml: A person is part of an organisation and wishes to sit on the jumpseat. Is he/she allowed?

options.a: He/She shall not occupy a jumpseat under any circumstances.
options.b: He/She can because he/she is an employee in the same company.
options.c: He/She can only if permitted by operator procedures.
options.d: He/She can only occupy a jumpseat if the pilot-in-command permits according to operator procedures.
